title: Can I filter on "conversations" associated with Tasks?
excerpt: Hi, just starting using Monday, I am trying to “filter” just to show the comments made in “conversations” within Tasks. is this possible (I have projects with over 2-300 tasks and many team members add to the comments fe…

posts.author: Graham (Graham Pearson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, just starting using Monday, I am trying to “filter” just to show the comments made in “conversations” within Tasks. is this possible (I have projects with over 2-300 tasks and many team members add to the comments feature - so i just want to show tasks that have conversations. Thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Graham! Would the inbox feature work for you here? This way, you can filter by the specific board and see all associated conversations

  • The Inbox

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Graham

Update Magic #1 will enable you to add update texts to a text column (don’t use long-text here) then you can use the normal monday search & filter functions (recipe shown here in a custom automation):

image1302×603 35 KB
